Localization.Description: Attempt to update the parameters of an authentication method

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} updated the parameters of authentication method "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} failed to update the parameters of authentication method "{object.type}" on host {event_src.host}. Reason: "{reason}".
